value.found_quote:
name: code-review
description: Reviews code changes for bugs, style issues, and best practices. Use when reviewing PRs or checking code quality.
value.rationale: The page includes a concrete example of a "code-review" skill for the Antigravity 2.0 agent, with a description explicitly mentioning reviewing PRs and checking code quality (bugs, style issues, best practices). This directly substantiates that the agent can perform automated code review of diffs/PRs for issues before they land, via the Skills system. The lifecycle status appears active as the page presents this as current, production documentation with no deprecation notices. Note: the page is for "Antigravity 2.0" (a Google product), and the example is presented as a real, usable skill pattern — not merely hypothetical — though the skill itself is user-created rather than a built-in automated feature, which introduces some nuance.
